originalTitle: Chennai Love Story Official Trailer | Kiran Abbavaraam | Gouri Priya | SKN | Sai Rajesh | Ravi
content: Chennai Love Story Official Trailer on @MythriMovieMakers A timeless tale of love, emotions, and destiny unfolds. Witness the beautiful journey of Steven & Nivi as they navigate love, dreams, and the moments that change their lives forever. Chennai Love Story - One of the most anticipated Telugu Films, that's a Honest & Intense Youthful Love Story starring Kiran Abbavaraam & Sri Gouri Priya From the Makers of Colour Photo and Baby, SKN & Sai Rajesh - Arriving in theatres on July 24th #ChennaiLoveStoryTrailer #ChennaiLoveStory #KiranAbbavaram #GouriPriya #SKN #SaiRajesh #Ravi Cast & Crew Details: Film: Chennai Love Story Banner : Mass Movie Makers, Amrutha Productions Producers : SKN, Sai Rajesh Director: Ravi Namburi Main Star Cast : Kiran Abbavaraam, Sri Gouri Priya Music Director : Manisharma Lyric Writer: Ananth SriRam Co Producer : Dheeraj Mogilineni Co Directors : K. Vijaya Sarathy, Lucky Bezawada DOP: Viswas Daniel ART Director: Bhaskar Mudavath Editor: Santosh Naidu Costume Designer: Devi Paruchuri Executive Producers: Vishala Datla, Nikhil Reddy Line Producer: Syam Prasad Meka (NANI) Production Controller: Deekshith Peesapati Production Executive: Sudhakar Bojja Publicity Designer: Ananth Kancherla Music Label : T-SERIES Trailer Credits : Sudhan, Babji Pinnisetti Click here to watch: PEDDI Trailer(Tamil): https://youtu.be/qu3tPDCMNeU NTR The Dragon Glimpse : https://youtu.be/bedocP4nRAo RANABAALI Title Glimpse: https://youtu.be/9Ik0Y8Pr3l0 Peddi Pehelwan: https://youtu.be/-HjPL9Nmf5M Peddi First Shot Glimpse: https://youtu.be/lvodg_AjQpY AA 23 Announcement Video: https://youtu.be/6hqduA_fUqE Sree Vishnu x Ram Abbaraju 2 Pooja Ceremony Highlights: https://youtu.be/6g_0N_7tibw Jai Hanuman Theme Song: https://youtu.be/EC9HZ3Ve16E For more updates from Mythri Movie Makers: Like - https://www.facebook.com/MythriMovieMakers Subscribe - https://goo.gl/eJiVkt​​ Twitter - https://twitter.com/MythriOfficial​​ Instagram: https://instagram.com/MythriOfficial
chineseSummary: 神话电影制作人 · 977,099 次观看
chineseContent: 金奈爱情故事官方预告片@MythriMovieMakers 一个关于爱、情感和命运的永恒故事展开。见证史蒂文和尼维的美好旅程，他们驾驭爱情、梦想和永远改变他们生活的时刻。金奈爱情故事 - 最受期待的泰卢固语电影之一，这是一部由彩色照片和婴儿制作者 Kiran Abbavaraam 和 Sri Gouri Priya 主演的诚实而激烈的青春爱情故事，SKN 和 Sai Rajesh - 将于 7 月 24 日抵达影院 #ChennaiLoveStoryTrailer #ChennaiLoveStory #KiranAbbavaram #GouriPriya #SKN #SaiRajesh #Ravi 演员和工作人员详细信息：电影：Chennai Love Story 横幅：Mass Movie Makers、Amrutha Productions 制片人：SKN、Sai Rajesh 导演：Ravi Namburi 主要演员：Kiran Abbavaraam、Sri Gouri Priya 音乐总监：Manisharma 歌词作者：Ananth SriRam 联合制片人：Dheeraj Mogilineni 联合导演：K. Vijaya Sarathy、Lucky Bezawada 摄影指导：Viswas Daniel 艺术总监：Bhaskar Mudavath 编辑：Santosh Naidu 服装设计师：Devi Paruchuri 执行制片人：Vishala Datla、Nikhil Reddy 制片人：Syam Prasad Meka (NANI) 制作总监：Deekshith Peesapati 制作主管：Sudhakar Bojja 宣传设计师：Ananth Kancherla 音乐厂牌：T-SERIES预告片来源：Sudhan、Babji Pinnisetti 点击此处观看：PEDDI 预告片（泰米尔语）：https://youtu.be/qu3tPDCMNeU NTR 龙一瞥：https://youtu.be/bedocP4nRAo RANABAALI 标题一瞥：https://youtu.be/9Ik0Y8Pr3l0 Peddi Pehelwan： https://youtu.be/-HjPL9Nmf5M Peddi 第一枪预览：https://youtu.be/lvodg_AjQpY AA 23 公告视频：https://youtu.be/6hqduA_fUqE Sree Vishnu x Ram Abbaraju 2 Pooja 仪式亮点：https://youtu.be/6g_0N_7tibw Jai Hanuman 主题歌曲：https://youtu.be/EC9HZ3Ve16E 了解 Mythri Movie 的更多更新
